name: blip
description: P2P LAN messenger — text, voice, and video. No cloud, no servers, no accounts.
author: krwg

scripts.prebuild: npm run copy-fonts && node scripts/sync-app-metadata.mjs && node scripts/sync-giphy-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-mesh-public-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-build-info.mjs
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && node scripts/sync-giphy-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-mesh-public-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-build-info.mjs && npm run build:icons && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win nsis
scripts.electron:build:portable: npm run build && node scripts/sync-giphy-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-mesh-public-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-build-info.mjs && npm run build:icons && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win portable
scripts.electron:build:all: npm run build && node scripts/sync-giphy-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-mesh-public-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-build-info.mjs && npm run build:icons && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win
scripts.electron:build:dir: npm run build && node scripts/sync-giphy-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-mesh-public-key.mjs && node scripts/sync-build-info.mjs && npm run build:icons && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win --dir
